title: cotyledon patens
intro: Cotyledon patens, also known as the Orpine or Joint Pine, is a succulent plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cotyledon patens include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, or applied topically as a salve or ointment.
